title: shim internal-field comment should reference specific struct member path
description: What is unclear: wolftpm_rs_shim.c says 'dev->ctx.cmdBuf is not part of wolfTPM's public API' but the exact field access (dev->ctx.cmdBuf) is used in three separate places (line 105, 107, 111, 115, 116, 134-138) without a single canonical explanation. The comment block is present at line 95 but the _Static_assert at line 60 is the real guard. For whom: a future maintainer upgrading wolfTPM who needs to check if cmdBuf is still accessible after a struct change. What would make it clear: consolidate the INTERNAL FIELD ACCESS rationale into one block immediately before the _Static_assert, and add the field path 'dev->ctx.cmdBuf' to the assert comments so the wolfTPM changelog diff is obvious.
